project_context.archetype: Archetype 7 (Electric & Neon) - Custom AI Lab Variant
project_context.target_audience: Enterprises and startups seeking AI-native custom development

grid_patterns.bento_marketing: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 md:gap-12

motion_and_interactions.page_reveals: Use framer-motion for staggered fade-in-up reveals on scroll. Initial: { opacity: 0, y: 20 }, WhileInView: { opacity: 1, y: 0 }
motion_and_interactions.chatbot_widget: Pulsating glow animation using Tailwind `animate-pulse` on the outer ring, smooth scale-in for the chat panel.
motion_and_interactions.hero_background: Use react-tsparticles for subtle floating data nodes, combined with a generative CSS gradient mesh or Framer Motion animated blob.

universal: Use purely HTML/Tailwind for main structure, Shadcn for interactive pieces (Tabs, Carousel, Form).
ALL interactive elements MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='hero-cta-button'`).
Never use pure black; use the defined #060611 deep navy base.

hero.layout: Centered alignment, massive H1, generative dark gradient mesh background.
hero.effects: Integrate a 3D orb or particle effect (react-tsparticles) behind the text.
hero.cta: Primary button: solid cyan with inverse dark text. Secondary: glass outline.

we_build_services.layout: Grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3. Cardless or 'Tracing Beam' style cards with subtle 1px border and hover glow.
we_build_services.content: UI/UX, Mobile, Cloud, Architectural, Testing, E-Commerce, Staffing.

tech_stack_marquee.layout: Full width, slow continuous scroll using `react-fast-marquee`.
tech_stack_marquee.style: Monochrome logos or text overlines (Ruby on Rails, AWS, PostgreSQL, Angular, etc.) separated by dots or stars.

capabilities_tabs.customization: Remove standard Vercel look. Use glassmorphism for the tab list, active tab gets an electric cyan bottom border or glow.

portfolio_case_studies.layout: Bento grid (Mode A) or large overlapping cards. High contrast images.
portfolio_case_studies.images: Use provided portfolio URLs. Max height 80vh on mobile.

testimonials.style: Minimalist cards, avatar images, generous padding.

contact_form.style: Dark inputs bg-[rgba(13,13,32,0.8)], cyan focus rings focus:ring-primary.

chatbot_widget.trigger: Circular button with `shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,240,255,0.5)]` and subtle pulse.
chatbot_widget.panel: Glass panel 350px wide. Chat interface + lead capture form inline.
